audience: SMEs and entrepreneurs who know what their digital product must do but have not yet chosen the right platform
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Bedrijven helpen kiezen tussen een webapp, PWA en mobiele app op basis van echte gebruikssituaties

searchIntent.question: Should my business build a web app, PWA or mobile app?
searchIntent.geographicContext: International English-speaking business audience, with VisualVibe serving Belgium and nearby regions

longTailKeywords: web app vs mobile app for business
directAnswer: Choose a web app when broad access, desktop use, immediate updates and central business processes matter most. Choose a mobile app when reliable offline use, device hardware, push notifications and frequent use on the move are central to the product.
title: Web app or mobile app: which is right for your business?
metaDescription: Web app or mobile app? Compare reach, offline use, camera access, push notifications, app stores, maintenance and budget to choose the right platform.
h1: Web app or mobile app: which is right for your business?

internalLinks.anchor: complete guide to building an app

factsToPreserve: A web app runs in a browser and provides one centrally updated version.
A mobile app can provide deeper hardware integration and stronger support for prolonged offline use.
PWA capabilities and support vary by browser and operating system.
Offline workflows must define local storage, synchronisation and conflict resolution.
Cross-platform technology reduces some work but does not eliminate platform differences.
A web app can be a sensible MVP, provided the architecture anticipates possible additional clients.
